title: SmartAgricultureDecisionSchema
description: Standardized output data structure for the AgriAgent decision support system, validating sensor telemetry states, diagnostics, and recommended actions.

packet_id.description: Unique identifier for the telemetry packet.

sensor_nodes.description: List of active greenhouse sensors and their diagnostic states.

sensor_id.description: Unique sensor identifier (e.g., temp_01, humidity_01, moisture_01, light_01).

sensor_value.description: Current real-time physical or logical reading value of the sensor (e.g., 34.5 for temperature).

sensor_quality_score.description: Diagnostic health score calculated by the SDQM (0.0 = faulty, 1.0 = perfect).

previous_state.description: Previous operational state of the sensor or control node (e.g., OFF, NORMAL, LOW).

current_state.description: Current operational or diagnostic state (e.g., ON, CRITICAL_HIGH, OUTLIER).

control_recommendations.description: List of recommended actuator actions and control signals conforming to project guidelines.

actuator_id.description: Identifier of the target device (e.g., light_01, fan_01, pump_01).

status.description: Decision status level as required by the course guidelines.

action.description: Target instruction or command for the actuator (e.g., TURN_ON_LIGHT, TURN_ON_PUMP, TURN_OFF).

confidence.description: Decision confidence computed by the Gemini reasoning agent (conforming to guidelines).

evidence.description: Agronomical citation and retrieved document snippets supporting the action decision.

english_explanation.description: Zero-hallucination natural language explanation generated by the anchored Gemini model.

crop_citations.description: Agronomical references and document page citations retrieved from ChromaDB.
